title: Command Block Sceptre
description: Added the Command Block Sceptre in AvM Movie.
body:
### English Description
A mod made by EverlaPrismerAya && Alkaid_MINECRAFT.\
Artworks: 孤帆Gufandf.\
Forge 1.20.1 Only.\
**Only the Simplified Chinese version is supported now.**

We added the **Command Block Sceptre** in the AvM Movie series.\
You can press 'V' to open the Skill Selection panel, click to choose the skill, then right-click to release the corresponding skill.

There are 11 modes: Flight, Flame, Warden Impact, Thunder Call, Arrow Rain, Block, Strengthen, Destruction, Obsidian Placement, TNT Projectile, and Web Placement.

Flight: 
- Immune to fall damage.
- Flying forward at high speed while sneaking.
- If the block 10 meters ahead of the player is air or water, the player will be teleported there when the right button is clicked.

Flame: 
- Right-click to launch fire charges.

Warden Impact: 
- Right-click to launch a warden sonic boom with 80 damage (♥ × 40).

Thunder Call: 
- Right-click to generate a guiding thunderbolt at a location 10 blocks ahead of the player.
- With the guiding thunder as the center, creatures within a radius of 7 squares will be struck by lightning, causing 120 damage (♥ × 60).

Arrow Rain: 
- Right-click to launch arrows and snowballs.
- Being hit by an arrow will result in approximately 80 points of damage (♥ × 40)

Block: 
- Right-click to make the player temporarily invulnerable.

Strengthen: 
- Right-click to grant a series of positive potion effects to players within a certain range around you.

Destruction: 
- Right-click to destroy blocks within a certain range in front of the player.
- Unlike the original movie, it cannot destroy blocks like bedrock that are unbreakable in survival mode. However, one can modify a block tag called **everlatweaker:unbreakable** through data packs or _kubejs_ to add or remove unbreakable blocks.

Obsidian Placement: 
- Right-click to summon an obsidian wall in front of the player.

TNT Projectile: 
- Right-click to launch a TNT that explodes immediately upon touching the ground.

Web Placement: 
- Right-click to summon a spider web wall in front of the player.

You can't get it in survival mode. In the EmDM modpack, it is synthesized using the X-Drive Alloy and the Storm Star.

### 简体中文版简介：
原作者：EverlaPrismerAya && Alkaid_MINECRAFT.\
美术：孤帆Gufandf\
目前只支持1.20.1版本。

本模组只增加了一样物品：来自 Alan Becker 团队制作的动画：《火柴人 vs 我的世界》(AvM) 中的命令方块权杖。\
使用方法：按V键打开技能选择面板，点击选择，右键释放对应技能。

一共有 11 个模式：飞行，烈焰，幽冥冲击，召雷，箭雨，格挡，强化，破坏，黑曜石放置，TNT抛射，蛛网放置。

- 飞行模式下玩家将免疫摔落伤害，潜行时向前高速飞行，右键时若玩家前方 10 格方块处为空气或水则将玩家传送过去；
- 烈焰模式下右键发射大量小火球；
- 幽冥冲击模式下右键发射一道伤害为 80 点（♥ × 40）的监守者音波；
- 召雷模式下右键会在玩家前方 10 格方块处生成一道引导雷，并使得以引导雷为中心，半径为 7 格范围内的生物被闪电击中，造成 120 点（♥ × 60）伤害；
- 箭雨模式下右键会发射大量箭和雪球，被箭击中将受到约 80 点（♥ × 40）的伤害；
- 格挡模式下右键会使得玩家短暂无敌；
- 强化模式下右键会使得使用者及使用者周围一定范围的玩家获得一系列正面 Buff；
- 破坏模式下右键会破坏玩家面前一系列方块（与原著不同，并不能破坏基岩等方块，但可以通过数据包或者_kubejs_修改一个叫 __everlatweaker:unbreakable__ 的方块标签实现对不可破坏方块的增删）；
- 黑曜石放置模式下右键会在玩家面前召唤一面黑曜石墙。
- TNT抛射模式下右键会发射一个触地立刻爆炸的TNT。
- 蛛网放置模式下右键会在玩家面前召唤一面蜘蛛网墙。

生存模式下暂无获取方法。EmDM整合包内是显驱合金加风暴之星合成。
